series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting support services provided to specific data processing equipment or installations including site visit reports, program and equipment service reports, service histories, and correspondence and memoranda. For service contracts, see OTC-504-17.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: site visit reports, problem and equipment service reports, and routine correspondence and memoranda warranty or guarantee of service has expired ; Electronic: site visit reports, problem and equipment service reports, and routine correspondence and memoranda warranty or guarantee of service has expired
